expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval pipeline: resolved vault path, ran index grep, full-page read on Navigation 3 CMP concept page, follow-up grep to confirm no additional page needed.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query 'Navigation 3 CMP NavDisplay back stack type-safe SavedStateConfiguration' matches routing table verbatim.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites 'concepts/Navigation 3 CMP.md'. Incorporates the page's specifics: NavKey sealed interface, SavedStateConfiguration polymorphic serializers, rememberNavBackStack overload choice, pinned alpha05 dependency coords.

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Addresses both requirements (type-safe routes + process-death survival) with the right Nav 3 multiplatform pattern, including the rememberSaveable mechanism that achieves survival.
